name: Summer Pasta and Lentil Salad (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound penne or medium sized pasta shells
--boiled until al dente -- drained and cooled
3 cups cooked French whole green lentils, cooled
1 cup finely diced red or yellow bell pepper
1 cup cherry tomatoes (left whole if small or halved)
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bottom of a mixing bowl combine the vegetable oil, extra virgin olive oil, white wine vinegar, and Dijon mustard.
2. Pass the peeled garlic through a press into the dressing and season it well with salt and pepper.
3. Add all the ingredients (pasta shells, lentils, carrot, scallions, celery, bell pepper, parsley, cherry tomatoes) but the pine nuts to the bowl. Toss to blend until well combined.
4. Adjust the seasoning as needed; add a bit more of whatever you think the salad needs.
5. Top each portion with the toasted pine nuts.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings
